Antibiotic Sensitivity Test 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is an antibiotic sensitivity test? 
Antibiotics are medicines used to fight bacterial and certain fungal infections. They are not effective for viral infections . There are different antibiotics, and each one only works well against certain types of bacteria or fungi. An antibiotic sensitivity test can help find out which antibiotic will
